basic_details.short_information: National Forensic Sciences University (NFSU) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of Guest Faculty Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for education jobs. Candidates with Eligibility of Assistant Professors of Universities/Colleges in UGC regulations. Ph.D. degree or experience preferred. qualification can directly attend the interview on .

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Eligibility of Assistant Professors of Universities/Colleges in UGC regulations. Ph.D. degree or experience preferred.
qualification.details: Guest Faculty: Eligibility of Assistant Professors of Universities/Colleges in UGC regulations. Ph.D. degree or experience will be given preference.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Guest Faculty, School of Cyber Security and Digital Forensics
Guest Faculty, School of Forensic Science

Guest Faculty, School of Forensic Science

salary_details.details: Remuneration will be provided as per the norms of the University.

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the National Forensic Sciences University (NFSU).

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name is Guest Faculty.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for the walk-in interview for School of Cyber Security and Digital Forensics is 4 July 2026, and for the School of Forensic Science is 5 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification is Eligibility of Assistant Professors of Universities/Colleges in UGC regulations. A Ph.D. degree or experience is preferred.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 70 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Guest Faculty position?
faq.answer: Remuneration will be provided as per the norms of the University.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the NFSU Tripura Campus located?
faq.answer: The NFSU Tripura Campus is located in Agartala, Tripura, with the pincode 799001.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry original documents, along with one copy of your Curriculum Vitae (CV) and xerox copies of your certificates.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any specific schools recruiting Guest Faculty?
faq.answer: Yes, the recruitment is for the School of Cyber Security and Digital Forensics and the School of Forensic Science.
